headline: Morgan Stanley Lifts Price Target on Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG)
summary: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (NYSE:PEG) is included among the 12 Best Utility Stocks to Buy Now According to Hedge Funds. Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (NYSE:PEG) is a predominantly regulated energy company that engages in the provision of electric and gas services.
